options.name: --from-date
options.description:
Past date to calculate churn from. Absolute in dd-mm-yyyy
or number of days back from now.

options.name: --churn
options.description:
Minimal churn. Specify either a number for minimum, or
float for precent.

options.name: --top
options.description: Return this number of top records.

options.name: --report
options.description:
Type of report to output. Use one of: table (default), xml,
csv, chartjs, simple

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude resources matching a list of regular expressions

options.name: --include
options.description: Include resources matching this regular expression

options.name: --output
options.description:
When set, writes the report to a specific file, to console
otherwise.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Set path to your repository otherwise defaults to current
directory.
